task: I need to explain a branch process change to my team next week, and I want the message to land clearly in a busy setting. Can you help me draft something I could say out loud in a quick staff huddle, plus a shorter version in case I only have a few seconds?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — keep it short, direct, and branch-focused.

## Huddle version
“Starting next week, we’re changing how we handle this process so we can keep things moving and avoid rework. The main point is: follow the new steps, make sure the file is complete before it moves, and flag anything unclear right away. If you’re not sure, stop and ask before it turns into cleanup later. I need everyone on the same page so we stay consistent.”

## Short version
“Next week, we’re using the new process. Follow the steps, keep the file complete, and flag issues early so we don’t create rework.”

## Even shorter
“New process starts next week. Follow the steps, keep files complete, and speak up early if something’s off.”

If you want, I can make it sound:
- firmer
- more conversational
- more manager-like for your branch team

user_simulator.text:
Close, but make it sound a little more like a branch manager, not generic HR stuff.

I want it to hit these points:
- what’s changing
- why it matters to the branch
- what I expect from them right away
- no extra fluff

And I’d like one version that sounds firm in a huddle, plus a 10-second version I can throw out if I’m moving fast.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here are branch-manager versions.

## Huddle version
“Starting next week, we’re changing how we handle this process so we can keep the branch moving and cut down on rework. What I need from everyone is simple: follow the new steps, make sure the file is complete before it moves, and flag anything off right away. If something doesn’t line up, stop and say something before it turns into cleanup later. I expect everyone to use the new process from day one.”

## 10-second version
“Next week, we’re on the new process. Follow the steps, keep the file complete, and flag issues early so we don’t create rework.”

If you want, I can make it a little firmer or a little more conversational.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It sounds like a branch manager now — straight to the point, no HR fluff. I can use that.
